voicePractice.readScript: Read the script aloud and clearly to receive instant feedback on your performance.
voicePractice.pastAttemptsDesc: Review your previous attempts and track your vocal improvement over time.
voicePractice.clarityDesc: How accurately you pronounced the words compared to the script. Higher score means clearer delivery.
voicePractice.energyDesc: Pitch variation in your voice while reading. Higher score means richer, less monotone delivery.
voicePractice.paceDesc: The rate of speech measured in words per minute. Ideal MC pace is typically 130-150 WPM.
voicePractice.recordToUnlock: Record your practice session to unlock detailed technical reports and coaching insights.
voicePractice.aiListening: AI is listening to your voice...
voicePractice.overallScoreDesc: Your overall score is calculated based on Clarity (45%), Energy (35%), and Pace (20%).
voicePractice.coverageDesc: Percentage of the script you successfully delivered compared to the total words.
voicePractice.paceSummaryDesc: Your average speaking rate. Professional MCs adjust pace based on the venue and content.
voicePractice.micAccessDenied: Microphone access denied. Please check your settings.
voicePractice.mentorDesc: Get personalized feedback from professional MC mentors.
voicePractice.sampleComparisonNote: Compares the shape of your intonation (pitch rise/fall) — not used for scoring, for visual reference only.
voicePractice.pitchContourWaiting: Waiting for voice to draw intonation curve...
voicePractice.audioTooLoud: Volume too loud — move away from the mic
voicePractice.audioNoisy: Background noise detected — find a quieter place
voicePractice.listenBeforeSubmit: Listen back before sending to AI
voicePractice.karaokeTooltip: Automatically highlight the current word as you read, using your browser's speech recognition
voicePractice.karaokeErrorNotAllowed: The browser blocked microphone access for speech recognition — go to site settings to grant permission.
voicePractice.karaokeErrorAudioCapture: Couldn't get a microphone signal for recognition (the mic may be in exclusive use by recording) — try reloading the page.
voicePractice.karaokeErrorNetwork: Speech recognition connection error — if you're using Brave/Coc Coc/another Chromium browser, this feature only works on official Google Chrome (chrome.com) since it needs Google's own recognition server.
voicePractice.karaokeErrorGeneric: Speech recognition error ({{error}}) — toggle Karaoke off and on to retry.
voicePractice.karaokeIdleHint: Press Start Recording to have words auto-highlight as you speak
voicePractice.syncPlaybackTooltip: Play back the recording with words highlighted to match what was actually said (Whisper), more accurate than live karaoke during recording
voicePractice.noteSaveHint: Enter to save · Shift+Enter for a new line
voicePractice.pdfExportError: Error generating PDF. Please try again.
voicePractice.jitterTooltip: Fundamental frequency variation. < 1% = stable, 1-2% = acceptable, > 2% = shaky/uneven voice
voicePractice.shimmerTooltip: Amplitude variation. < 3% = good, 3-5% = normal, > 5% = weak or tired voice
voicePractice.hnrTooltip: Harmonics-to-Noise Ratio. ≥ 15dB = clear voice, 10-15dB = acceptable, < 10dB = noisy
voicePractice.spectralCentroidTooltip: Spectral centroid. Higher values = brighter, clearer voice. Ideal for MCs: ≥ 1500 Hz.
voicePractice.mfccStabilityTooltip: Sound structure stability (MFCC). ≥ 50/100 = consistent, stable pronunciation. Low = uneven pronunciation.
voicePractice.pitchContourTooltip: Voice pitch trend. Rising (↗) = pitch goes up, usually a question. Falling (↘) = pitch goes down, a statement. Flat (→) = steady.
voicePractice.fillerWordsTooltip: Unnecessary filler words (um, uh, like, so...). More filler words → less professional. MCs should aim for ≤ 2%.
voicePractice.werTooltip: Word Error Rate — percentage of words misrecognized. Professional MCs should achieve < 15%. Lower is more accurate.
voicePractice.cerTooltip: Character Error Rate — percentage of characters misrecognized. Reflects clarity of individual sounds. Good: < 10%.
voicePractice.overallScoreCardTooltip: Composite score weighted by the lesson's criteria (Pronunciation, Expressiveness, Rhythm...)
voicePractice.wpmCardTooltip: Words Per Minute — speaking rate. Professional MCs: 120-165 WPM.
voicePractice.guestTrialBanner: You're on a <1>free trial</1> — results won't be saved.
voicePractice.guestRegisterCta: Sign up free and get a day of any course →

voiceLibrary.description: Practice with premium scripts and get instant AI feedback on accuracy, rhythm, and speaking pace. Master the voice, master the stage.
voiceLibrary.aiCoachingDesc: Our AI analyzes your voice using 80 Mel filters and Whisper models to provide professional analytics.

home.heroSubtitle: Revolutionize your MC career with real-time vocal analysis and elevate your speaking skills with our AI-powered training platform.
home.coreAdvantageDesc: We've combined AI technology with professional industry standards to build the ultimate playground for MCs.
home.rhythmCoachDesc: Our AI analyzes your pace and tone to help you sync perfectly with any event atmosphere.
home.realTimeFeedbackDesc: Receive instant scores on pronunciation, speed, and emotional delivery to improve faster.
home.extensiveLibraryDesc: Access hundreds of professional scripts across various event categories, from weddings to corporate galas.
home.premiumVoicesDesc: Spotlight on this month's most trending MC talents.
home.step1Desc: Record your voice and get instant AI metrics on your performance.
home.step2Desc: Monitor your improvement over time with detailed analytics and personalized recommendations.
home.step3Desc: Build confidence and deliver flawless performances for any event script.
home.ctaDesc: Join the elite community of 500+ MCs who have elevated their careers with MCHub. Don't just speak, make an impact.
